about_home.title: About Clean Mountain & CO
about_home.intro: In the Abondance Valley, CLEAN MOUNTAIN & CO supports you with tailored maintenance services in Châtel, La Chapelle-d'Abondance and Abondance.
about_home.personal: As a self-employed professional, I offer you a personalized, reliable and responsive service, with real attention to detail, to guarantee a unique and memorable experience for your guests or clients.
about_home.v1_text: Professional service and attention to detail
about_home.v2_text: Products and methods that respect the environment

about.intro_text: Clean Mountain was born from a passion for the Alps and a desire to offer superior quality cleaning services adapted to the unique requirements of mountain life.
about.history_p1: I am Angie IZNARDO, specialized in professional cleaning of chalets, apartments, and Airbnb rentals. I ensure impeccable accommodations, ready to welcome your guests quickly and efficiently. I use eco-friendly products for a cleaning that respects your property and the environment.
about.history_p2: Optional: I offer home-cooked meals and gourmet gift sets to provide a unique and memorable experience for your travelers. Save time, enhance your property, and attract more customers. Contact me now for a fast quote.
about.zone_text: I primarily serve the following municipalities:
about.zone_p2: My deep knowledge of the terrain and local weather conditions allows me to adapt my services to the specificities of each season. Whether in winter with snow or in summer with trail dust, I am equipped to meet all your needs.
about.v1_title: Irreproachable Quality – Rigor and attention to the smallest details, nothing is left to chance.
about.v2_title: Environmental Respect – Methods and products that respect alpine nature.
about.v3_title: Trust and Professionalism – Reliability and discretion for your peace of mind.

eco.subtitle: I am committed to cleaning that respects the alpine environment.
eco.benefits_title: Benefits for my Clients and Nature
eco.benefits_p1: With Clean Mountain, enjoy healthy spaces and a preserved quality of life, while protecting the alpine ecosystems of Châtel and its surroundings.
eco.benefits_p2: Your trust contributes directly to the preservation of local biodiversity and the purity of our mountain environment for a sustainable future.

menu.hero_description: "The maquis" is the soul of Ivorian cuisine: a lively, warm, and authentic place where generous dishes are shared in a friendly atmosphere. At Angie's Maquis, the spirit of the maquis rises up and invites itself into the mountains.
menu.title: Exotic Menus
menu.subtitle: Fresh ingredients, refined and tasty recipes
menu.starter_desc: A light and fragrant mix, ideal for awakening the taste buds
menu.p1_desc: Refined alliance of vegetables and exotic fragrances
menu.p3_name: Melting eggplant stew with beef or free-range chicken
menu.p4_name: Country Mafé "peanut sauce" with beef or free-range chicken
menu.p4_desc: Explosion of authentic flavors with its creamy sauce.
menu.p5_name: Exotic Ivorian grills and their rougaille
menu.p5_desc: Festival of flavors and barbecue indulgence. Choose between Ivorian braised fish or Ivorian braised chicken.
sides: Fragrant pilaf rice or delicate coconut rice
menu.ps_veggie: All my dishes can be adapted for vegetarians
menu.ps_spices: Mild spices, spicy version available on request.
menu.order_desc: Finalize your order. I will contact you quickly to confirm details.

testimonials.title: What my clients say
testimonials.subtitle: Your satisfaction is my greatest reward. Discover the reviews of those who trust me in Châtel.

reviews.r1_text: Impeccable service! My chalet has never been so clean. The attention to detail is impressive.
reviews.r2_text: The Angie's Maquis menu was an incredible discovery. A real culinary journey delivered right to our door.
reviews.r3_text: Top professionalism and responsiveness for managing my Airbnb rental. I highly recommend!
